title: Anapalina pulchra
taxonomy: Anapalina pulchra is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Iridaceae. It is native to South Africa. The classification of Anapalina pulchra is within the order Asparagales. This classification helps to identify its relationship to other plants within the same family. Anapalina pulchra is often included in the same family as other irises and gladiolus.
